channel.title: Pegasystems Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Pegasystems Inc. (pega).

item.title: CVE-2025-62180 · 7.1 HIGH — Pega Platform versions 8.3.0 through Infinity 25.1.2 are affected by an authorization weakness that may allow authenticated users to access certain additional data via crafted URLs.
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.3.0 through Infinity 25.1.2 are affected by an authorization weakness that may allow authenticated users to access certain additional data via crafted URLs.

item.title: CVE-2026-1711 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Pega Platform versions 8.1.0 through 25.1.1 are affected by a Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability in a user interface component. Requires a high privileged user with a developer role.
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1.0 through 25.1.1 are affected by a Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability in a user interface component. Requires a high privileged user with a developer role.

item.title: CVE-2026-1564 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Pega Platform versions 8.1.0 through 25.1.1 are affected by an HTML Injection vulnerability in a user interface component. Requires a high privileged user with a developer role.
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1.0 through 25.1.1 are affected by an HTML Injection vulnerability in a user interface component. Requires a high privileged user with a developer role.

item.title: CVE-2026-1079 · 6 MEDIUM 🌩️ — A native messaging host vulnerability in Pega Browser Extension (PBE) affects users of all versions of Pega Robotic Automation who have installed Pega Browser Extension.
item.description: A native messaging host vulnerability in Pega Browser Extension (PBE) affects users of all versions of Pega Robotic Automation who have installed Pega Browser Extension. A bad actor could create a website that contains malicious code that targets PBE…

item.title: CVE-2026-1078 · 7.2 HIGH 🌩️ — An arbitrary file-write vulnerability in Pega Browser Extension (PBE) affects Pega Robotic Automation version 22.1 or R25 users who are running automations that work with Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge.
item.description: An arbitrary file-write vulnerability in Pega Browser Extension (PBE) affects Pega Robotic Automation version 22.1 or R25 users who are running automations that work with Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge. A bad actor could create a website that includ…

item.title: CVE-2025-62184 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Pega Platform versions 8.1.0 through 25.1.0 are affected by a Stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in a user interface component.
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1.0 through 25.1.0 are affected by a Stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in a user interface component. Requires an administrative user and given extensive access rights, impact to Confidentiality is low and Integrity i…

item.title: CVE-2026-0898 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — An arbitrary file-write vulnerability in Pega Browser Extension (PBE) affects Pega Robot Studio developers who are automating Google Chrome and Microsoft Edge using either version 22.1 or R25.
item.description: An arbitrary file-write vulnerability in Pega Browser Extension (PBE) affects Pega Robot Studio developers who are automating Google Chrome and Microsoft Edge using either version 22.1 or R25. This vulnerability does not affect Robot Runtime users. A…

item.title: CVE-2025-62183 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Pega Platform versions 8.1.0 through 25.1.1 are affected by a Stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in a user interface component. Requires an administrative user and given extensive access rights, impact to Confidentiality and Integrity are low.
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1.0 through 25.1.1 are affected by a Stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in a user interface component. Requires an administrative user and given extensive access rights, impact to Confidentiality and Integrity are low.

item.title: CVE-2025-62182 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Pega Customer Service Framework versions 8.7.0 through 25.1.0 are affected by a Unrestricted file upload vulnerability, where a privileged user could potentially upload a malicious file.
item.description: Pega Customer Service Framework versions 8.7.0 through 25.1.0 are affected by a Unrestricted file upload vulnerability, where a privileged user could potentially upload a malicious file.

item.title: CVE-2025-62181 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Pega Platform versions 7.1.0 through Infinity 25.1.0 are affected by a User Enumeration where during user authentication process, a difference in response time could allow a remote unauthenticated user to determine if a username is valid or not.
item.description: Pega Platform versions 7.1.0 through Infinity 25.1.0 are affected by a User Enumeration. This issue occurs during user authentication process, where a difference in response time could allow a remote unauthenticated user to determine if a username is…

item.title: CVE-2025-9559 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Pega Platform versions 8.7.5 to Infinity 24.2.2 are affected by a Insecure Direct Object Reference issue in a user interface component that can only be used to read data
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.7.5 to Infinity 24.2.2 are affected by a Insecure Direct Object Reference issue in a user interface component that can only be used to read data.

item.title: CVE-2025-8681 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Pega Platform versions 7.1.0 to Infinity 24.2.2 are affected by a Stored XSS issue in a user interface component
item.description: Pega Platform versions 7.1.0 to Infinity 24.2.2 are affected by a Stored XSS issue in a user interface component. Requires a high privileged user with a developer role.

item.title: CVE-2025-2161 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Pega Platform versions 7.2.1 to Infinity 24.2.1 are affected by an XSS issue with Mashup

item.title: CVE-2025-2160 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.4.3 to Infinity 24.2.1 are affected by an XSS issue with Mashup

item.title: CVE-2024-12211 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1 to Infinity 24.2.0 are affected by an Stored XSS issue with profile.

item.title: CVE-2024-10716 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1 to Infinity 24.2.0 are affected by an XSS issue with search.

item.title: CVE-2024-10094 · 9.1 CRITICAL
item.description: Pega Platform versions 6.x to Infinity 24.1.1 are affected by an issue with Improper Control of Generation of Code

item.title: CVE-2024-6702 · 5.2 MEDIUM
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1 to Infinity 24.1.2 are affected by an HTML Injection issue with Stage.

item.title: CVE-2024-6701 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1 to Infinity 24.1.2 are affected by an XSS issue with case type.

item.title: CVE-2024-6700 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1 to Infinity 24.1.2 are affected by an XSS issue with App name.

item.title: CVE-2023-50168 · 7.7 HIGH
item.description: Pega Platform from 6.x to 8.8.4 is affected by an XXE issue with PDF Generation.

item.title: CVE-2023-50167 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Pega Platform from 7.1.7 to 23.1.1 is affected by an XSS issue with editing/rendering user html content.

item.title: CVE-2023-50166 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Pega Platform from 8.5.4 to 8.8.3 is affected by an XSS issue with an unauthenticated user and the redirect parameter.

item.title: CVE-2023-50165 · 8.5 HIGH
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.2.1 to Infinity 23.1.0 are affected by an Generated PDF issue that could expose file contents.

item.title: CVE-2023-32089 · 4.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1 to 8.8.2 are affected by an XSS issue with Pin description

item.title: CVE-2023-32088 · 4.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1 to Infinity 23.1.0 are affected by an XSS issue with ad-hoc case creation

item.title: CVE-2023-32087 · 4.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Pega Platform versions 8.1 to Infinity 23.1.0 are affected by an XSS issue with task creation

item.title: CVE-2023-4843 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Pega Platform versions 7.1 to 8.8.3 are affected by an HTML Injection issue with a name field utilized in Visual Business Director, however this field can only be modified by an authenticated administrative user.

item.title: CVE-2023-32090 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Pega platform clients who are using versions 6.1 through 7.3.1 may be utilizing default credentials

item.title: CVE-2023-28094 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Pega platform clients who are using versions 7.4 through 8.8.x and have upgraded from a version prior to 8.x may be utilizing default credentials.

item.title: CVE-2023-26465 · 8 HIGH
item.description: Pega Platform versions 7.2 to 8.8.1 are affected by an XSS issue.

item.title: CVE-2023-28093 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: A user with a compromised configuration can start an unsigned binary as a service.

item.title: CVE-2023-26467 · 8.1 HIGH
item.description: A man in the middle can redirect traffic to a malicious server in a compromised configuration.

item.title: CVE-2023-26466 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: A user with non-Admin access can change a configuration file on the client to modify the Server URL.

item.title: CVE-2022-35656 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Pega Platform from 8.3 to 8.7.3 vulnerability may allow authenticated security administrators to alter CSRF settings directly.

item.title: CVE-2022-35655 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Pega Platform from 7.3 to 8.7.3 is affected by an XSS issue due to a misconfiguration of a datapage setting.

item.title: CVE-2022-35654 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Pega Platform from 8.5.4 to 8.7.3 is affected by an XSS issue with an unauthenticated user and the redirect parameter.

item.title: CVE-2022-24083 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Password authentication bypass vulnerability for local accounts can be used to bypass local authentication checks.

item.title: CVE-2022-24082 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: If an on-premise installation of the Pega Platform is configured with the port for the JMX interface exposed to the Internet and port filtering is not properly configured, then it may be possible to upload serialized payloads to attack the underlying…

item.title: CVE-2021-27654 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Forgotten password reset functionality for local accounts can be used to bypass local authentication checks.

item.title: CVE-2021-27651 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In versions 8.2.1 through 8.5.2 of Pega Infinity, the password reset functionality for local accounts can be used to bypass local authentication checks.

item.title: CVE-2021-27653 · 6.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Misconfiguration of the Pega Chat Access Group portal in Pega platform 7.4.0 - 8.5.x could lead to unintended data exposure.
